$comment: MCP servers this migration toolkit uses. Committed so a clone is self-configuring:
VS Code's Copilot reads this file directly. GitHub Copilot CLI users add the same
servers with `/mcp` (or copy these into ~/.copilot/mcp-config.json under an 'mcpServers' key).
See AGENTS.md > 'Required Copilot setup' for the full setup, including the Fabric skill plugins.
